# tenableio_folder (Resource)

Manages a scan folder in Tenable.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a folder to organize scans
resource "tenableio_folder" "production" {
  name = "production-scans"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the folder.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier for the folder.
- `type` (String) The type of the folder (custom, main, trash).
